# PlayersB - Full LLM Context

PlayersB is a football analytics website with static, generator-driven pages and scheduled data automation.

## Core sections
- `/players/` and `/players/{id}/`: player profiles and performance snapshots.
- `/compare/`: side-by-side player comparison tool.
- `/fantasy/`: role/filter-based fantasy shortlist page.
- `/matches/`: competition fixtures and recent results.
- `/standings/`: league tables by competition.
- `/archive/`: historical competition/season archive pages.
- `/teams/`, `/positions/`, `/competitions/`: navigational taxonomy pages.
- `/learn/` and `/glossary/`: educational explainers and definitions.

## Structured/crawl signals
- Canonicals are directory-style URLs with trailing slashes.
- Sitemap is generated at `/sitemap.xml`.
- RSS/updates feed is generated at `/feed.xml`.
- JSON-LD is included across templates and topic pages.

## Automation model
- Scheduled workflow runs approximately every 6 hours.
- Pipeline sequence:
  1. fetch football data (fixtures/standings/scorers)
  2. fetch archive sources
  3. fetch players with fallback strategy
  4. sync players from fantasy scorers
  5. generate all pages + quality gate

## Data reliability policy
- Supports secret aliases for Football-Data token in CI.
- Uses pacing/retries for Football-Data rate limits.
- Uses free-source and local-seed fallbacks to avoid pipeline breaks.
- Includes post-fetch sanity checks to avoid publishing empty competition datasets.

## Site intent
- Educational football analytics for discoverability, explainability, and player-first workflows.
- Not a betting site.
